Academic_Description_for_Website__c.value: To meet the needs of qualified personnel generated by the growing presence of PLM Solutions, Académie du PLM opened in Vichy in 2005. PLM offers multiple opportunities for high-value careers, and Académie du PLM strives to enable students to pursue a wide range of functional and technological professions.
CIMTT provides professional and innovative business consulting in the areas of computer-aided production engineering, and information and business management.

Clemson Formula SAE is a student-run organization dedicated to the enrichment of the Clemson students’ education through the design, manufacturing, and running of an open-wheeled racecar. From engineering to marketing, computer programming to graphic design, CUFSAE has something to offer for every student. We aim to provide our students with the tools and experience to ready for their future careers, regardless of where it may be.

The mission of the Department of Mechanical Engineering is to promote and develop culture, research and innovation in its sectors of reference, but also in new fields destined to become more and more important in society and in our present background.

Name.value: Dipartimento di Meccanica - Politecnico di Milano

Academic_Description_for_Website__c.value: DIMNP is a research structure of the University of Pisa with a strong focus in applicative research projects with wide scientific and technological significance.

Name.value: DMINP- Universita Di Pisa- Dipartimento di Ingegneria Meccanica Nucleare e della Produzione
ENSIBS (Ecole nationale supérieure d’ingénieurs de Bretagne Sud)

Academic_Description_for_Website__c.value:
Faculty of Technical Sciences was established in 1960. It has ~ 1.300 employees and more that 10.000 students. It is practically technical university with almost all engineering disciplines, consisting of 13 departments:
•	Production Engineering
•	Mechanization and Construction Engineering
•	Energy and Process Engineering
•	Technical Mechanics
•	Power, Electronics and Telecommunications Engineering 
•	Computing and Automatics
•	Civil Engineering
•	Traffic Engineering
•	Architecture and Urbanism
•	Industrial Engineering and Management
•	Graphic Engineering and Design
•	Environmental Engineering
•	Fundamental Disciplines in Engineering.

Name.value: Faculty of Technical Sciences Novi Sad

Academic_Description_for_Website__c.value: Münster University of Applied Sciences has a long tradition of education: founded in 1971 after the merger of public and private schools of engineering and vocational training institutions, it is now one of Germany's largest and most successful institutions of its kind. Our university is one of the strongest research in Germany. Whether medical or financial communication: We offer variety, which opens in innovative developments. Partners in industry and science will benefit from our professional structures. We put away on networking across disciplinary boundaries.

Name.value: FH Münster University of Applied Sciences

Academic_Description_for_Website__c.value: The Fraunhofer Institute for Mechatronic Systems Design IEM is an expert for intelligent mechatronics in the context of industry 4.0. Scientists from the fields of mechanical engineering, software engineering and electrical engineering collaborate interdisciplinary at the Paderborn site. Focusing on “Advanced Systems Engineering“, Fraunhofer IEM explores innovative methods and tools for the development of intelligent products, production systems and services. Underlying core competencies are intelligence in mechatronic systems, Systems Engineering and Virtual Prototyping

The Gdańsk University of Technology is a technical university in Gdańsk-Wrzeszcz, and one of the oldest universities in Poland. The Gdańsk University of Technology puts an emphasis on personality development, effective teamwork, interdisciplinary projects and innovative characters of realised ventures.

The Institute of Aircraft Systems Engineering of the Technical University of Hamburg stands for research and teaching in the field of aviation. We belong to the leading aerospace research institutions in Germany and are part of the Hamburg Excellence Cluster " New Flying ". The location at the Technology Centre Hamburg-Finkenwerder is an optimal instrument for cooperation with the various sectors of the aviation industry, research institutions and authorities.

Our research and teaching include mechatronic aircraft systems and basic aircraft technology. In addition, special areas of flight physics, flight control and system automation, actuators and hydraulic and avionics are examined. For aviation interested students we offer the specialized Master's program FSTMS.

The Neu-Ulm University of Applied Sciences (HNU) was founded in 1994, gained independence in 1998 and is now an internationally connected Business School. The HNU combines academic learning with the development of students’ cultural and social skills and promotes international exchange.
The Hochschule für Technik und Wirtschaft in Berlin, Germany, or HTW Berlin has about 12,000 students studying in the areas of engineering, computer science, business and graphic arts.

Name.value: Hochschule für Technik und Wirtschaft Berlin

Academic_Description_for_Website__c.value: Kempten University of Applied Sciences is located in the southwest of Bavaria in the heart of the Allgäu region. It was founded as a state-owned university of applied sciences in 1977. More than 6.000 young women and men study here with a good view of the Alps. Varied degree courses are offered, covering Business & Tourism Management, Social & Health Sciences, Engineering Sciences and Computer Science & Multimedia.

Name.value: Hochschule Kempten - University of Applied Sciences

Academic_Description_for_Website__c.value: We, the Institute for Production Management and Technology (IPMT), research fundamental production problems and develop models, processes and processes for industrial practice.  We consist of the two areas of Production Management and Production Technology. The department of production management, headed by Prof. Lödding, deals in particular with the organizational and information technology design of production processes. The field of production engineering, headed by Prof. Hintze, develops innovative methods and means for machining modern industrial materials. Our aim is to achieve excellence in teaching, research and cooperation with our industrial partners.

ITSL contributes to the economic, social and cultural development of the region, the State and Mexico. ITSL is committed to the implementation of quality and comprehensive training to help students become socially committed.

IPEK acts as a link between universities and industry in the field of development and construction, and PDM/PLM/CAx. The IPEK is part of the machinery of the Hochschule für Technik Rapperswil (HSR) programme and has existed since 1996.

Name.value: IPEK - Institut für Produktdesign, Entwicklung und Konstruktion

Academic_Description_for_Website__c.value:
The University of Angers harks back to a very long history of universities in the city.
By 1080, the “Studium” or the School of Angers was already a renowned scholarly institution. It received the title “university” in 1356, and in 1364, Charles V granted the university its autonomy and privileges. The fi rst statutes were drawn up in 1373. By 1450, the university had colleges in Law, Theology, Arts and Medicine, which attracted students from the whole of France. Sharing the fate of other universities, it was abolished during the French Revolution. Angers remained an important focus of intellectual and academic activity, and higher education persisted, with free, public courses in Medicine as early as 1796, and with the creation of the School of Medicine of Angers in 1807

Name.value: ISTIA - Ecole d'Ingenieurs de l'Universite d'Angers

Academic_Description_for_Website__c.value: The Royal Institute of Technology is a university in Stockholm, Sweden. KTH was founded in 1827 as Sweden's first polytechnic and is one of Scandinavia's largest institutions of higher education in technology.

Lapland University of Applied Sciences is a Finnish University of applied sciences located in Kemi, Tornio and Rovaniemi. Lapland UAS refine expertise and vitality to meet the needs of northern people and organisations.

The NED University of Engineering & Technology was established in March 1977 under an act of the Provincial Assembly of Sindh after upgrading of the former NED Government Engineering College, which was set up in 1922. The NED University is thus one of the oldest institution in Pakistan for teaching and producing Engineering graduates.

Ohio University is a major U.S. public research university located primarily in Athens, Ohio and offers more than 250 areas of undergraduate study. Ohio University strives to be the best student-centered, transformative learning community where students realize their promise, faculty advance knowledge, staff achieve excellence, and alumni become global leaders.

PIN s.c.r.l. Educational and Scientific Services for the University of Florence, is a non-profit consortium with majority public share, funded in 1992 
Main shareholders are the University of Florence, Municipality of Prato, Province of Prato, Chamber of Commerce, CariPrato Bank Foundation, main Entrepreneurial Associations and other private and public bodies of the local area
It is financed with funds coming from its own activities and with private as well as public resources, and manages the Prato Campus of the University of Florence
It is a bridge to close the gap between university and local society

The University of Torino is today one of the largest Italian Universities, open to an international perspective in the fields of both research and training. The University of Torino covers virtually every field of knowledge.

The POLITEHICA University of Bucharest is the oldest and the most prestigious engineering school in Romania, which was established in 1818. It consists now of 15 faculties with an annual admission number of 5000 students, with more than 90 study programs for bachelor degree and more than 170 study programs for masterate studies of which 20 programs are in foreign languages. 
The POLITEHNICA University of Bucharest actively supports the development of partnerships with higher education institutions and other organizations. Over the past 200 years of experience, UPB has concluded numerous bilateral agreements both to ensure the exchange of students and teachers and to develop research in the field of engineering sciences.
Polytechnic University was established by the Japanese government and is under the management of Japan Organization for Employment of the Elderly, Persons with Disabilities and Job Seekers.

Name.value: polytechnic University - Syokugyodai / 職業大学

Academic_Description_for_Website__c.value:
PSG College of Technology, an ISO 9001:2000 certified institution is one of the foremost institutions
founded by the PSG & Sons' Charities Trust (1926). The College was established in the year 1951 and
the Founders wisely decided to locate it in the same campus as the PSG Industrial Institute for effective industry-institute interaction. The College today has a student strength of about 8518 with 15 engineering and technology departments besides the computer applications, management sciences, basic sciences and humanities departments. The college has signed MoU with research organizations and industries in order to promote closer interaction with other institutions in the areas of technology development, training of students, curriculum updating and development of state-of-art centres.

Purdue University, founded in 1869 in West Lafayette, Indiana, is committed to student success, changing how classes are taught with greater focus on faculty-student interaction and creative uses of technology. Aras Innovator has been configured to manage the workflows and processes of a freshman Engineering class of 650 students as well as a more advanced MBD class. This includes the management weekly course content, assignment submission, group projects and grades. The instance familiarizes students with specific workflows and processes associated with a PLM system. Aras Innovator is also the basis of an Essentials of Product Data Management text and is used by two SAE teams. Several Purdue projects have been contributed to the Aras Community site.
Seoul National University, the first national university in South Korea, has a mission is to create a vibrant intellectual community where students and scholars join together in building the future.

Established in 1901, Syracuse University’s L.C. Smith College of Engineering and Computer Science (LCS) has a long tradition of preparing leaders and of responsiveness in meeting regional and national needs. We are very proud of the efforts and accomplishments our community of faculty, staff, graduate and undergraduate students, and alumni and friends worldwide.

The Technische Universität Dresden is a German elite university, the largest institute of higher education in the city of Dresden, the largest university in Saxony and one of the 10 largest universities in Germany.
TU / e is a research university, specializing in engineering science & technology. With high-quality research, the university contributes to the advancement of technical sciences and innovation.

The University of North Carolina at Charlotte is a public research university in Charlotte, North Carolina. It is the second-largest school in the UNC system by student enrollment, with slightly more than 30,000 students. UNC Charlotte maintains a particular commitment to addressing the cultural, economic, educational, environmental, health, and social needs of the greater Charlotte region.

Name.value: The University of North Carolina at Charlotte

Academic_Description_for_Website__c.value:
The Australian Centre for Field Robotics (ACFR) is based in the School of Aerospace, Mechanical and Mechatronic Engineering at The University of Sydney, and is dedicated to the research, development, application and dissemination of autonomous and intelligent robots and systems for operation in outdoor environments.

The ACFR is one of the largest robotics research institutes in the world and has been instrumental in developing breakthrough technologies and in conducting world-leading research and development of field robotics principles and systems.

The School of Engineering at the University of León in Spain offers studies in three branches if the engineering: industrial engineering, computer science and aerospace/aeronautical engineering.
We offer studies at three levels: bachelor, master and doctoral for the three branches of the engineering.
Other masters include: Industry 4.0; Cybersecurity; Big Data and Business Intelligence; Production in Pharmaceutical Industries.
The University of León has 12.000 students enrolled, and 2.000 are studying at the School of Engineering.

The University of Seville was founded under the name of Colegio Santa María de Jesús in 1505 in Seville, Spain. It has a present student body of over 65,000, and is one of the top-ranked universities in the country.
The University of Lyon, located in Lyon and Saint-Étienne, France, is a center for higher education and research comprising 16 institutions of higher education.

The University of Duisburg-Essen is a public university in Duisburg and Essen, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany and a member of the newly founded University Alliance Metropolis Ruhr. It is among the 10 largest German universities.

The University of Naples Federico II was established in 1224 and was the first publicly funded university in Europe. The university has thirteen schools, eighty-two departments, about 100,000 students enrolled, and over 3,000 academic staff members.

UPEI offers a wide range of programs and degrees to undergraduate, graduate and doctoral students. Home to multiple Canada Research Chairs, a Canada Excellence Research Chair in Aquatic Epidemiology, a UNESCO Chair in Island Studies and Sustainability, endowed or sponsored research chairs, and 3M Teaching Award-winners, UPEI offers its students access to exceptional faculty, researchers, and staff. UPEI students come from all walks of life and from local, regional, national and international locations. In 2016, international students from close to 70 countries comprise almost 21 per cent of the University's total enrollment.
The University of Saskatchewan is a Canadian public research university, founded in 1907, and located on the east side of the South Saskatchewan River in Saskatoon, Saskatchewan, Canada.

Bundeswehr University Munich (German: Universität der Bundeswehr München, UniBw München) is one of only two federal research universities in Germany that both were founded in 1973 as part of the German Armed Forces (Bundeswehr). Universität der Bundeswehr München has well-established scientific research and forms part of two excellence clusters of the German government's university excellence initiative.

UTC is both a French national university and an engineering school, with autonomous training and pedagogy and an innovation-intensive, interdisciplinary technological research program. UTC produces graduates (engineers, Master’s degree, PhDs) capable of taking into account the interactions of technologies with Mankind and Society at large and of evolving in a world-scale competitive environment, with the aim of complying with sustainable development policies. The UTC lecturers, research scientists and engineers “lend meaning to innovation”, enabling the emergence of new axes underpinning this concept, introducing entrepreneurship principles in the heart of their concerns.

Located between Lyon and Grenoble, on the borders of Switzerland and Italy, the Université Savoie Mont Blanc is a major player in regional and cross-border intellectual, social and economic development. Thanks to the close and constructive links it has forged with other local and regional actors, the Université Savoie Mont Blanc is today an essential partner in the university dynamics of a francophone space that transcends borders. At the beginning of the 2017 academic year, it has nearly 15,000 students to whom it offers about 200 degree courses at all levels of L-M-D. Its teaching is based on the activities of 19 recognized research laboratories.

Created in 1999, UTBM is a university with scientific, cultural and professional objectives. A member of a group of universities of technology, UTBM was formed from the merger of two universities: the Engineering University of Belfort and the Polytechnic Institute of Sevenans.

Name.value: UTBM - Université de Technologie de Belfort-Montbéliard
